if.test: category != null and category != '' and category != 'all'
visibleStatus != null and visibleStatus != '' and visibleStatus != 'all'

choose.when:
AND ( TO_CHAR(c.COMMENT_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
OR UPPER( 'CMT-' || LPAD( TO_CHAR(c.COMMENT_ID), 5, '0' ) ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

AND ( TO_CHAR(p.POST_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
OR UPPER( 'POST-' || LPAD( TO_CHAR(p.POST_ID), 3, '0' ) ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST_COMMENT ) AS "total",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST_COMMENT WHERE TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) AS "today",
( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COMMENT_ID) FROM COMMENT_REPORT ) AS "reportedCommentCount",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT_REPORT WHERE STATUS = 'WAITING' ) AS "pendingReportCount"
FROM DUAL

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM POST_COMMENT c
JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON p.POST_ID = c.POST_ID

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.COMMENT_ID AS comment_id, c.POST_ID AS post_id, c.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, c.CONTENT AS content, c.PARENT_COMMENT_ID AS parent_comment_id,
c.IS_VISIBLE AS is_visible,
c.CREATED_AT AS created_at, c.UPDATED_AT AS updated_at,
TO_CHAR( c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS created_at_text,
TO_CHAR( c.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS updated_at_text,
c.LIKE_COUNT AS like_count,
NVL(r.REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS report_count,
NVL(r.PENDING_REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS pending_report_count,
p.TITLE AS post_title, LOWER(p.CATEGORY) AS post_category,
m.NICKNAME AS nickname, m.PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS profile_image_url,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY c.CREATED_AT DESC, c.COMMENT_ID DESC ) AS RN
FROM POST_COMMENT c
JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON p.POST_ID = c.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMMENT_ID, COUNT(*) AS REPORT_COUNT,
SUM( CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS PENDING_REPORT_COUNT
FROM COMMENT_REPORT
GROUP BY COMMENT_ID ) r ON r.COMMENT_ID = c.COMMENT_ID
)
WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM COMMENT_REPORT
WHERE STATUS = 'WAITING'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS "reportId", r.COMMENT_ID AS "commentId", c.POST_ID AS "postId",
c.CONTENT AS "commentContent", c.MEMBER_ID AS "commentAuthor", c.PARENT_COMMENT_ID AS "parentCommentId",
p.TITLE AS "postTitle", LOWER(p.CATEGORY) AS "postCategory",
r.MEMBER_ID AS "reporterMemberId", r.REASON AS "reason",
TO_CHAR( r.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS "createdAt",
r.STATUS AS "status",
COUNT(*) OVER ( PARTITION BY r.COMMENT_ID ) AS "commentReportCount",
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT DESC, r.REPORT_ID DESC ) AS RN
FROM COMMENT_REPORT r
JOIN POST_COMMENT c ON c.COMMENT_ID = r.COMMENT_ID
JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON p.POST_ID = c.POST_ID
WHERE r.STATUS = 'WAITING' )
WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT c.COMMENT_ID AS comment_id, c.POST_ID AS post_id, c.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, c.CONTENT AS content, c.PARENT_COMMENT_ID AS parent_comment_id,
c.IS_VISIBLE AS is_visible,
c.CREATED_AT AS created_at, c.UPDATED_AT AS updated_at,
TO_CHAR( c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS created_at_text,
TO_CHAR( c.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS updated_at_text,
c.LIKE_COUNT AS like_count,
NVL(r.REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS report_count,
NVL(r.PENDING_REPORT_COUNT, 0) AS pending_report_count,
p.TITLE AS post_title, LOWER(p.CATEGORY) AS post_category,
m.NICKNAME AS nickname, m.PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS profile_image_url
FROM POST_COMMENT c
JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON p.POST_ID = c.POST_ID
LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMMENT_ID, COUNT(*) AS REPORT_COUNT,
SUM( CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS PENDING_REPORT_COUNT
FROM COMMENT_REPORT
GROUP BY COMMENT_ID ) r ON r.COMMENT_ID = c.COMMENT_ID
WHERE c.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}

SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS report_id, r.COMMENT_ID AS comment_id, r.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, r.REASON AS reason,
r.CREATED_AT AS created_at,
TO_CHAR( r.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS created_at_text,
NVL(r.STATUS, 'WAITING') AS status,
h.ADMIN_MEMO AS admin_memo,
TO_CHAR( h.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI' ) AS processed_at
FROM COMMENT_REPORT r
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT HISTORY_ID, REPORT_ID, TARGET_ID, ADMIN_MEMO, CREATED_AT
FROM ( SELECT mrh.*,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY mrh.REPORT_TYPE, mrh.REPORT_ID, mrh.TARGET_ID
ORDER BY mrh.CREATED_AT DESC, mrh.HISTORY_ID DESC ) AS RN
FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY mrh
WHERE mrh.REPORT_TYPE = 'COMMENT' )
WHERE RN = 1 ) h ON h.REPORT_ID = r.REPORT_ID AND h.TARGET_ID = r.COMMENT_ID
WHERE r.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.CREATED_AT DESC, r.REPORT_ID DESC
mapper.update: LOCK TABLE MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY IN EXCLUSIVE MODE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, TARGET_MEMBER_ID, REPORTER_MEMBER_ID, REPORT_TYPE, REPORT_ID, TARGET_ID, REASON, RESULT_STATUS, ADMIN_MEMO, CREATED_AT )
SELECT ( SELECT NVL(MAX(HISTORY_ID), 0) + 1 FROM MEMBER_REPORT_HISTORY ),
c.MEMBER_ID, r.MEMBER_ID, 'COMMENT', r.REPORT_ID, r.COMMENT_ID, r.REASON, #{resultStatus}, #{adminMemo}, SYSDATE
FROM COMMENT_REPORT r
JOIN POST_COMMENT c ON c.COMMENT_ID = r.COMMENT_ID
WHERE r.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND r.REPORT_ID = #{reportId} AND r.STATUS = #{resultStatus}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT COMMENT_ID
FROM POST_COMMENT
START WITH COMMENT_ID IN
#{commentId}
CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR COMMENT_ID = PARENT_COMMENT_ID
mapper.update:
UPDATE COMMENT_REPORT
SET STATUS = STATUS
WHERE 1 = 0

UPDATE COMMENT_LIKE
SET COMMENT_ID = COMMENT_ID
WHERE 1 = 0

UPDATE POST_COMMENT
SET IS_VISIBLE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE
WHERE COMMENT_ID IN
#{commentId}
AND NVL(IS_VISIBLE, 'Y') = 'Y'
